hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if fp.endswith('index.html'):
    r = subprocess.run(['git', 'stash', '--include-untracked', '-m', 'auto-stash before index.html edit'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    msg = r.stdout.strip() or r.stderr.strip()
    if msg and msg != 'No local changes to save':
        print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'git stash: ' + msg}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
